insight: ChatControl's Discord integration requires the DiscordSRV plugin. Users must disable DiscordSRV's built-in chat relay by setting `DiscordChatChannelMinecraftToDiscord: false` in DiscordSRV's `config.yml`, otherwise messages get duplicated. ChatControl checks this on startup and logs a warning if it's still enabled (see ChatControl.java line ~247).

Death messages support `{killer_item}` (material name with hover tooltip) and `{killer_item_name}` (custom display name from anvil, falls back to material name). Item display names from anvils can contain raw `&`/`§` color codes that get processed by the chat formatter — the `killer_item_name` variable strips these via `CompChatColor.stripColorCodes()` to prevent color injection.
